testcase.name: test_list_budgets
testcase.failure: tests/test_budgets.py:54: in test_list_budgets assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid or expired token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_budget_by_month
testcase.failure: tests/test_budgets.py:78: in test_get_budget_by_month test_month = all_budgets[0]["month"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 0

testcase.name: test_create_budget

failure.message: TypeError: string indices must be integers, not 'str'

testcase.failure: tests/test_budgets.py:105: in test_create_budget session.delete(f"{BASE_URL}/api/budgets/{budget['id']}") ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: string indices must be integers, not 'str'

testcase.name: test_create_duplicate_budget_fails

failure.message: TypeError: string indices must be integers, not 'str'

testcase.failure: tests/test_budgets.py:150: in test_create_duplicate_budget_fails session.delete(f"{BASE_URL}/api/budgets/{budget['id']}") ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: string indices must be integers, not 'str'

testcase.name: test_get_single_budget
testcase.failure: tests/test_budgets.py:180: in test_get_single_budget budget_id = budgets[0]["id"] ^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 0

testcase.name: test_get_nonexistent_budget
testcase.failure: tests/test_budgets.py:195: in test_get_nonexistent_budget assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404, got 401 E assert 401 == 404 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

failure.message: TypeError: string indices must be integers, not 'str'

testcase.failure: tests/test_budgets.py:210: in test_update_budget session.delete(f"{BASE_URL}/api/budgets/{budget['id']}") ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: string indices must be integers, not 'str'
